summary: SEO-friendly trading article landing page covering basics of trading, background of trading, and how to start trading for beginners.
architectural_notes: SEO-friendly HTML structure with proper meta tags, headings, and schema markup required
known_issues: Application generation failed twice for the trading article page request
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Stylized financial trading hero banner with candlestick charts and glowing gold lines on a dark charcoal background, wide landscape composition (trading-hero.dim_1200x500.png)

existing_features.title: Create a professional article landing page titled 'Trading Skills for Beginners' with three main content sections: (1) Basics of Trading – explaining fundamental concepts like assets, markets, and buy/sell mechanics; (2) Background of Trading – a brief history and evolution of trading markets; (3) How to Start Trading – a step-by-step beginner guide covering account setup, choosing a broker, risk management, and making first trades.

Apply a bold, modern financial/editorial visual theme to the landing page using a dark charcoal and gold color palette, strong typography with a serif headline font and clean sans-serif body font, and a structured editorial layout with clear visual hierarchy. The design should feel credible and professional, suitable for a financial education article.
Add a hero banner image depicting a financial trading theme — a stylized stock chart or market candlestick pattern — rendered as a static asset and displayed as the article hero background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Professional article/landing page for 'Trading Skills for Beginners' with sections on basics, background, and how to start trading
